_comment: Curated whitelist. Generator emits ONLY these slugs. Set include:false to drop. Fields here override scanned values; omit a field to let the generator fill it from the repo.

idae.name: Idae
idae.tagline: Monorepo layer for idae-machine · DDD multi-tenant platform
idae.description: Monorepo couche infrastructure pour idae-machine : applicatif DDD multi-tenant en SvelteKit. Modules : query engine (MongoDB-like), real-time sync, state management, routing et couche API/backend.

css-base.tagline: Modern CSS design system, no build

sive.description: Full-featured writing application powered by AI. Real-time suggestions, narrative coherence analysis, and mobile-first design. Production-ready since v1.0.

humemory.tagline: Memory for AI agents that forgets like a human

domus.tagline: Reactive UI framework in Rust (web + desktop)
domus.description: Reactive UI framework written entirely in Rust. Targets both web (WASM) and desktop with zero JavaScript overhead. Alpha stage (v0.1.0) with growing documentation.

pseudo-html-stack.name: pseudo-stack
pseudo-html-stack.tagline: Vanilla HTML component system, no build

jobber.tagline: Tailor a resume to a job, fully local
jobber.description: Local-first tool that matches your resume to a job description, rewrites sections with Ollama, generates ATS-friendly PDFs, and auto-fills applications via Playwright. No cloud, no subscription.

singleton-notepad.name: SingletonNotepad
singleton-notepad.tagline: Windows 11 notes on a single file
